title: JetBrains security advisory (AV26-412)
description: On April 30, 2026, JetBrains published a security advisory to address a vulnerability in the following product:
products: JetBrains IntelliJ IDEA  versions prior to 2024.3.7.1, 2025.1.7.1, 2025.2.6.2, 2025.3.4.1 and 2026.1.1
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
